Part.Source: Event Start loadWWPContext.Call(&WwpContext) do 'boletos' &IsNotaAutorizada = false &IsBoletoRegistrado = false &IsNaoEnviados = true &now = now() For &i = year(&now) - 2 to year(&now) step 1 &dataAno.AddItem(&i,str(&i)) Endfor &dataAno = year(&now) &dataMes = month(&now) do 'AtualizaDia' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ GridsdtPedidoss.Rows = Page.Rows GridsdtPedidossPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = GridsdtPedidoss.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridsdtPedidossCurrentPage = GridsdtPedidoss.CurrentPage &GridsdtPedidossPageCount = GridsdtPedidoss.PageCount /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridsdtPedidoss.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &UserUpdate = !'' &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselOption) &ActionSelecione.TooltipText = "" &ImprimirDanfe = !'' &ImprimirNFSe = !'' &DoImprimir = !'' &EnviarEmail = !'' &sdtPedidos__PedCodWithTags.HorizontalAlignment = !'Right' &sdtPedidos__PedCodWithTags = trim(&sdtPedidos.CurrentItem.PedCod.ToFormattedString()) If &sdtPedidos.CurrentItem.IsJaEnviou = true &sdtPedidos__PedCodWithTags += format(!"", "Email ou Whats já enviados") EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ if &sdtPedidos.CurrentItem.NfsCod > 0 &NFSe = trim(str(&sdtPedidos.CurrentItem.NfsNum)) Else &NFSe = '' Endif if &sdtPedidos.CurrentItem.NfeCod > 0 &NFe = trim(str(&sdtPedidos.CurrentItem.NfeNum)) Else &NFe = '' Endif &ActionSelecione.Visible = 1 &ImprimirDanfe.Visible = 0 &ImprimirNFSe.Visible = 0 &DoImprimir.Visible = 0 Do Case Case &sdtPedidos.CurrentItem.NfeSts = Status_Nfe.Autorizada and &sdtPedidos.CurrentItem.NfeCod > 0 &NFe.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagSuccess WWColumnTagSuccessSingleCell' &ImprimirDanfe.Visible = 1 Case &sdtPedidos.CurrentItem.NfeSts = Status_Nfe.Digitando and &sdtPedidos.CurrentItem.NfeCod > 0 &ActionSelecione.Visible = 0 &NFe.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell' Otherwise &NFe.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' EndCase Do Case Case &sdtPedidos.CurrentItem.NfsSts = Status_Nfe.Autorizada and &sdtPedidos.CurrentItem.NfsCod > 0 &ImprimirNFSe.Visible = 1 &NFSe.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagSuccess WWColumnTagSuccessSingleCell' Case &sdtPedidos.CurrentItem.NfsSts = Status_Nfe.Digitando and &sdtPedidos.CurrentItem.NfsCod > 0 &ActionSelecione.Visible = 0 &NFSe.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell' Otherwise &NFSe.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' EndCase If not &sdtPedidos.CurrentItem.CreDtaRet.IsEmpty() &Boleto.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagSuccess WWColumnTagSuccessSingleCell' &Boleto = 'REGISTRADO' &DoImprimir.Visible = 1 Else &Boleto.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell' &Boleto = 'SEM_REGISTRO' &ActionSelecione.Visible = 0 Endif if &sdtPedidos.CurrentItem.isMarcar = true &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOption) Endif &UserUpdate.LinkTarget = '_blank' &UserUpdate.Link = wpPessoa.Link('WWCLIENTE', 'UPD', &WwpContext.EmpCod, &sdtPedidos.CurrentItem.PedCliCod) EndEvent Event GridsdtPedidossPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridsdtPedidossPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' GridsdtPedidoss.PreviousPage() Case GridsdtPedidossPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' &PageToGo = GridsdtPedidoss.CurrentPage &PageToGo += 1 GridsdtPedidoss.GotoPage(&PageToGo) Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridsdtPedidossPaginationBar.SelectedPage) GridsdtPedidoss.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridsdtPedidossPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ GridsdtPedidoss.Rows = GridsdtPedidossPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue GridsdtPedidoss.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoMarcar' For &sdtPedidosItem in &sdtPedidos if (not &sdtPedidosItem.CreDtaRet.IsEmpty()) and ((&sdtPedidosItem.NfsSts = Status_Nfe.Autorizada and &sdtPedidosItem.NfsCod > 0) or &sdtPedidosItem.NfsCod = 0) and ((&sdtPedidosItem.NfeSts = Status_Nfe.Autorizada and &sdtPedidosItem.NfeCod > 0) or &sdtPedidosItem.NfeCod = 0) &sdtPedidosItem.isMarcar = true Endif EndFor do 'totaliza' refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoTodosEnviarEmail' &GUID = GUID.NewGuid() &ChaveVarchar = &GUID.ToString() if &Count > 0 &WebSession.Set(&ChaveVarchar, &sdtPedidos.ToJson()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ TodosEnviarEmail_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Else msg('Nenhuma mensalidade selecionada para envio!') Endif EndEvent Event TodosEnviarEmail_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wcEnviaEmailMensalidade.Create(&ChaveVarchar, &filtroAno, &filtroMes) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event TodosEnviarEmail_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoCarregarMensalidades' &filtroAno = &dataAno &FiltroMes = &dataMes prcLocalizaMensalidadesGeradas.Call(&WwpContext.EmpCod, &wwpContext.FiLCod, &dataAno, &dataMes, &dataDia, &IsNotaAutorizada, &IsBoletoRegistrado, &IsNaoEnviados, &PesRaz, &sdtPedidos) do 'totaliza' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoMensalidades' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wwMensalidades.Call() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoNFSe' wwNotasServico.Link() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoRegistrar' wpBoletosRegistrar.Popup(&WwpContext.EmpCod) wwMensalidadesGeradas.Link() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event limpar_campo.Click For &sdtPedidosItem in &sdtPedidos &sdtPedidosItem.isMarcar = false EndFor do 'totaliza' refresh EndEvent Event &ActionSelecione.Click if &sdtPedidos.CurrentItem.isMarcar = true &sdtPedidos.CurrentItem.isMarcar = false &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselOption) else &sdtPedidos.CurrentItem.isMarcar = true &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOption) Endif do 'totaliza' EndEvent Event &dataMes.ControlValueChanged do 'AtualizaDia' EndEvent Event &EnviarEmail.Click wpEnviamensalidade.Popup(&sdtPedidos.CurrentItem.EmpCod, &sdtPedidos.CurrentItem.FilCod, &sdtPedidos.CurrentItem.PedCod) EndEvent Event &ImprimirNFSe.Click GeraPdfDanfeNFSe.Call(&sdtPedidos.CurrentItem.EmpCod, &sdtPedidos.CurrentItem.NfsCod, &UrlPDF, &UrlFisico) RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = Link(&UrlPDF) RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) EndEvent Event &ImprimirDanfe.Click GeraPdfDanfe.Call(&sdtPedidos.CurrentItem.EmpCod, &sdtPedidos.CurrentItem.FiLCod, &sdtPedidos.CurrentItem.NfeCod, &UrlPDF, &UrlFisico) RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = Link(&UrlPDF) RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) EndEvent Event &DoImprimir.Click &DupEMpCod = &sdtPedidos.CurrentItem.EmPCod &DupFiLCod = &sdtPedidos.CurrentItem.FiLCod &DupCreCod = &sdtPedidos.CurrentItem.CreCod do 'getImprimir' EndEvent Sub 'boletos' retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWREMESSA', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1, &wwRemessaAutNiv) &QtdBolSemReg = 0 if &wwRemessaAutNiv > 1 //OR &AutIsAdm = TRUE &QtdBolSemReg = RetornaBoletosSemRegistro.udp(&WwpContext.EmpCod) txtBoletoSemRegistro.Caption = format('(%1) boletos sem registro', trim(str(&QtdBolSemReg))) Endif tbBoletos.Visible = &QtdBolSemReg > 0 prcCtePendentes.call(&WwpContext.EmpCod, &CountCte, &Count55, &Count65, &CountServico,&CountReceitas) txtServico.Caption = trim(str(&CountServico)) + ' NFSe pendente de autorização!' tbNotas.Visible = &CountServico > 0 EndSub Sub 'totaliza' &count = 0 For &sdtPedidosItem in &sdtPedidos if &sdtPedidosItem.isMarcar = true &Count += 1 Endif EndFor DuplicatasSelect.Caption = format('%1 - Selecionados', trim(str(&Count))) EndSub Sub 'AtualizaDia' &dataAux = YMDtoD(&dataAno, &dataMes, 1) &data = EoM(&dataAux) &dataDia.clear() &dataDia.AddItem(0,'MÊS INTEIRO') For &i = 1 to &data.Day() &dataDia.AddItem(&i,str(&i)) Endfor EndSub Sub 'getImprimir' For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod Where EmpCod = &DupEMpCod Where FilCod = &DupFiLCod Where CreCod = &DupCreCod prcAtualizaRetornoInter.Call(EmpCod, &WwpContext.PesCod) If CreSts = Status_Duplicata.CANCELADA msg('ATENÇÃO! Duplicata cancelada verifique!') Else Do case Case CreCbrImp = TipoImpressao.GerarBoleto and CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.DUPLICATA &sdtGerarBoleto.Clear() &sdtGerarBoletoItem.CreCod = CreCod &sdtGerarBoletoItem.CreFilCod = FilCod &sdtGerarBoletoItem.CreEmpCod = EmpCod &sdtGerarBoleto.Add(&sdtGerarBoletoItem) GerarBoleto.Call(&sdtGerarBoleto, true, &IsErro, &newSdtBoleto) If &IsErro = false RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = RELJAS045.Link(EmpCod, FilCod, &Random) RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) EndIF Case CreCbrImp = TipoImpressao.ImprimirBoleto and CreBloNro <> '' and CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.DUPLICATA //BANCO ENVIA AND COM REGISTRO &sdtGerarBoleto.Clear() &sdtGerarBoletoItem.CreCod = CreCod &sdtGerarBoletoItem.CreFilCod = FilCod &sdtGerarBoletoItem.CreEmpCod = EmpCod &sdtGerarBoleto.Add(&sdtGerarBoletoItem) GerarBoleto.Call(&sdtGerarBoleto, true, &IsErro, &newSdtBoleto) If &IsErro = false RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = RELJAS045.Link(EmpCod, FilCod, &Random) RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) EndIF EndCase EndIf EndFor EndSub
